ame%3A%20payload%3F.name%20%3F%3F%20null%2C%20hasFundingSourceDetails%3A%20Boolean(rawFunding)%2C%20fundingSourceType%3A%20Array.isArray(rawFunding)%20%3F%20%22array%22%20%3A%20typeof%20rawFunding%2C%20requestedFundingFields%2C%20activeFundingFields%2C%20unavailableFundingFields%3A%20requestedFundingFields.filter((field)%20%3D%3E%20!activeFundingFields.includes(field))%20%7D%2C%20itemsBeforeNormalize%3A%20rawItems.length%2C%20itemsAfterNormalize%3A%20normalizedItems.length%20%7D)%3B%20if%20(!normalizedItems.length)%20%7B%20return%20%5B%7B%20account_id%3A%20payload%3F.id%20%3F%3F%20null%2C%20account_name%3A%20payload%3F.name%20%3F%3F%20null%2C%20billing_status%3A%20payload%3F.account_status%20%3F%3F%20null%2C%20amount_spent%3A%20payload%3F.amount_spent%20%3F%3F%20null%2C%20balance%3A%20payload%3F.balance%20%3F%3F%20null%2C%20currency%3A%20payload%3F.currency%20%3F%3F%20null%20%7D%5D%3B%20%7D%20return%20normalizedItems%3B%20%7D%20%7D%3B%20%2F%2F%20src%2FFBInspector%2Fmodules%2Fads.js%20var%20normalizeAdsRows%20%3D%20(items%20%3D%20%5B%5D)%20%3D%3E%20items.map((item)%20%3D%3E%20(%7B%20id%3A%20item.id%20%3F%3F%20null%2C%20name%3A%20item.name%20%3F%3F%20%22%5Cu0411%5Cu0435%5Cu0437%20%5Cu043D%5Cu0430%5Cu0437%5Cu0432%5Cu0430%5Cu043D%5Cu0438%5Cu044F%22%2C%20status%3A%20item.status%20%3F%3F%20null%2C%20effective_status%3A%20item.effective_status%20%3F%3F%20null%2C%20campaign_id%3A%20item.campaign_id%20%3F%3F%20null%2C%20adset_id%3A%20item.adset_id%20%3F%3F%20null%2C%20creative_id%3A%20item.creative%3F.id%20%3F%3F%20null%20%7D))%3B%20var%20adsModule%20%3D%20%7B%20id%3A%20%22ads%22%2C%20title%3A%20%22%5Cu041E%5Cu0431%5Cu044A%5Cu044F%5Cu0432%5Cu043B%5Cu0435%5Cu043D%5Cu0438%5Cu044F%22%2C%20requiresAccountContext%3A%20true%2C%20async%20load(%7B%20accessToken%2C%20context%20%3D%20%7B%7D%2C%20logDebug%20%7D)%20%7B%20const%20adAccountId%20%3D%20context.selectedAdAccountId%3B%20if%20(!adAccountId)%20%7B%20throw%20%7B%20code%3A%20%22ADS_ACCOUNT_CONTEXT_REQUIRED%22%2C%20message%3A%20%2 Cu0438%5Cu0435%20%5Cu043D%5Cu0435%20%5Cu0432%5Cu0445%5Cu043E%5Cu0434%5Cu0438%5Cu0442%20%5Cu0432%20allowlist%20%5Cu0442%5Cu0435%5Cu043A%5Cu0443%5Cu0449%5Cu0435%5Cu0439%20policy-%5Cu043A%5Cu043E%5Cu043D%5Cu0444%5Cu0438%5Cu0433%5Cu0443%5Cu0440%5Cu0430%5Cu0446%5Cu0438%5Cu0438.%22)%3B%20%7D%20if%20(action.requiresAdAccount%20%26%26%20!context.selectedAdAccountId)%20%7B%20return%20buildDenied(%22AD_ACCOUNT_REQUIRED%22%2C%20%22%5Cu0422%5Cu0440%5Cu0435%5Cu0431%5Cu0443%5Cu0435%5Cu0442%5Cu0441%5Cu044F%20%5Cu0432%5Cu044B%5Cu0431%5Cu0440%5Cu0430%5Cu0442%5Cu044C%20ad%20account%20%5Cu043F%5Cu0435%5Cu0440%5Cu0435%5Cu0434%20%5Cu0432%5Cu044B%5Cu043F%5Cu043E%5Cu043B%5Cu043D%5Cu0435%5Cu043D%5Cu0438%5Cu0435%5Cu043C%20%5Cu0434%5Cu0435%5Cu0439%5Cu0441%5Cu0442%5Cu0432%5Cu0438%5Cu044F.%22)%3B%20%7D%20if%20(action.riskLevel%20%3D%3D%3D%20%22high%22%20%26%26%20!policy.allowHighRiskActions)%20%7B%20return%20buildDenied(%22HIGH_RISK_BLOCKED%22%2C%20%22%5Cu0412%5Cu044B%5Cu0441%5Cu043E%5Cu043A%5Cu043E%5Cu0440%5Cu0438%5Cu0441%5Cu043A%5Cu043E%5Cu0432%5Cu044B%5Cu0435%20%5Cu0434%5Cu0435%5Cu0439%5Cu0441%5Cu0442%5Cu0432%5Cu0438%5Cu044F%20%5Cu043E%5Cu0442%5Cu043A%5Cu043B%5Cu044E%5Cu0447%5Cu0435%5Cu043D%5Cu044B%20%5Cu043F%5Cu043E%5Cu043B%5Cu0438%5Cu0442%5Cu0438%5Cu043A%5Cu043E%5Cu0439%20%5Cu0431%5Cu0435%5Cu0437%5Cu043E%5Cu043F%5Cu0430%5Cu0441%5Cu043D%5Cu043E%5Cu0441%5Cu0442%5Cu0438.%22)%3B%20%7D%20return%20%7B%20allowed%3A%20true%2C%20reasonCode%3A%20%22ALLOWED%22%2C%20reason%3A%20%22%5Cu0414%5Cu0435%5Cu0439%5Cu0441%5Cu0442%5Cu0432%5Cu0438%5Cu0435%20%5Cu0440%5Cu0430%5Cu0437%5Cu0440%5Cu0435%5Cu0448%5Cu0435%5Cu043D%5Cu043E%20%5Cu043F%5Cu043E%5Cu043B%5Cu0438%5Cu0442%5Cu0438%5Cu043A%5Cu043E%5Cu0439.%22%20%7D%3B%20%7D%20%7D%3B%20var%20summarizePolicy%20%3D%20(policy%20%3D%20basePolicy)%20%3D%3E%20(%7B%20phase3ActionsEnabled%3A%20Boolean(policy.phase3ActionsEnabled)%2C%20allowHighRiskActions%3A%20Boolean(policy.allowHighRiskActions)%2C%20allowlistSize%3A%20Array.isArray(policy.allowedActionIds)%20%3F%20policy.allowedActionIds.length%20%3A%200%20%7D)%3B%20%2F%2F%20src%2FFBInspector%2Fcore%2Factions%2Faudit.js%20var%20nowIso%20%3D%20()%20%3D%3E%20(%2F*%20%40__PURE__%20*%2F%20new%20Date()).toISOString()%3B%20var%20summarizeContext%20%3D%20(context%20%3D%20%7B%7D)%20%3D%3E%20(%7B%20selectedAdAccountId%3A%20context.selectedAdAccountId%20%7C%7C%20null%2C%20selectedBusinessId%3A%20context.selectedBusinessId%20%7C%7C%20null%20%7D)%3B%20var%20actionAudit%20%3D%20%7B%20createEntry(%7B%20stage%2C%20actionId%2C%20status%2C%20context%20%3D%20%7B%7D%2C%20details%20%3D%20%7B%7D%20%7D)%20%7B%20return%20%7B%20ts%3A%20nowIso()%2C%20stage%2C%20actionId%2C%20status%2C%20context%3A%20summarizeContext(context)%2C%20details%20%7D%3B%20%7D%20%7D%3B%20%2F%2F%20src%2FFBInspector%2Fcore%2Factions%2Fpipeline.js%20var%20actionPipeline%20%3D%20%7B%20async%20run(%7B%20actionId%2C%20context%20%3D%20%7B%7D%2C%20policy%2C%20logger%3A%20logger2%2C%20execute%20%7D)%20%7B%20const%20startedAt%20%3D%20Date.now()%3B%20const%20action%20%3D%20actionsRegistry.getById(actionId)%3B%20logger2(actionAudit.createEntry(%7B%20stage%3A%20%22resolve%22%2C%20actionId%2C%20status%3A%20action%20%3F%20%22ok%22%20%3A%20%22error%22%2C%20context%2C%20details%3A%20%7B%20found%3A%20Boolean(action)%20%7D%20%7D))%3B%20const%20decision%20%3D%20actionPolicy.evaluate(action%2C%20context%2C%20policy)%3B%20logger2(actionAudit.createEntry(%7B%20stage%3A%20%22policy%22%2C%20actionId%2C%20status%3A%20decision.allowed%20%3F%20%22ok%22%20%3A%20%22blocked%22%2C%20context%2C%20details%3A%20decision%20%7D))%3B%20if%20(!decision.allowed)%20%7B%20return%20%7B%20ok%3A%20false%2C%20stage%3A%20%22policy%22%2C%20reasonCode%3A%20decision.reasonCode%2C%20reason%3A%20decision.reason%20%7D%3B%20%7D%20const%20precheck%20%3D%20%7B%20enabled%3A%20Boolean(action%3F.enabled)%2C%20reason%3A%20action%3F.enabled%20%3F%20%22Action%20%5Cu043F%5Cu043E%5Cu043C%5Cu0435%5Cu0447%5Cu0435%5Cu043D%20%5Cu043A%5Cu0430%5Cu043A%20enabled.%22%20%3A%20%22Action%20%5Cu043E%5Cu0442%5Cu043A%5Cu043B%5Cu044E%5Cu0447%5Cu0451%5Cu043D%20%5Cu0432%20registry.%22%20%7D%3B%20logger2(actionAudit.createEntry(%7B%20stage%3A%20%22precheck%22%2C%20actionId%2C%20status%3A%20precheck.enabled%20%3F%20%22ok%22%20%3A%20%22blocked%22%2C%20context%2C%20details%3A%20precheck%20%7D))%3B%20if%20(!precheck.enabled)%20%7B%20return%20%7B%20ok%3A%20false%2C%20stage%3A%20%22precheck%22%2C%20reasonCode%3A%20%22ACTION_DISABLED%22%2C%20reason%3A%20%22%5Cu0414%5Cu0435%5Cu0439%5Cu0441%5Cu0442%5Cu0432%5Cu0438%5Cu0435%20%5Cu043E%5Cu0442%5Cu043A%5Cu043B%5Cu044E%5Cu0447%5Cu0435%5Cu043D%5Cu043E%20%5Cu0432%20registry.%22%20%7D%3B%20%7D%20const%20confirmResult%20%3D%20%7B%20required%3A%20Boolean(action%3F.destructive)%2C%20confirmed%3A%20!action%3F.destructive%2C%20mode%3A%20action%3F.destructive%20%3F%20%22manual_required%22%20%3A%20%22auto_confirm_read_only%22%20%7D%3B%20logger2(actionAudit.createEntry(%7B%20stage%3A%20%22confirm%22%2C%20actionId%2C%20status%3A%20confirmResult.confirmed%20%3F%20%22ok%22%20%3A%20%22blocked%22%2C%20context%2C%20details%3A%20confirmResult%20%7D))%3B%20if%20(!confirmResult.confirmed)%20%7B%20return%20%7B%20ok%3A%20false%2C%20stage%3A%20%22confirm%22%2C%20reasonCode%3A%20%22CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED%22%2C%20reason%3A%20%22%5Cu0414%5Cu043B%5Cu044F%20%5Cu044D%5Cu0442%5Cu043E%5Cu0433%5Cu043E%20%5Cu0434%5Cu0435%5Cu0439%5Cu0441%5Cu0442%5Cu0432%5Cu0438%5Cu044F%20%5Cu0442%5Cu0440%5Cu0435%5Cu0431%5Cu0443%5Cu0435%5Cu0442%5Cu0441%5Cu044F%20%5Cu044F%5Cu0432%5Cu043D%5Cu043E%5Cu0435%20%5Cu043F%5Cu043E%5Cu0434%5Cu0442%5Cu0432%5Cu0435%5Cu0440%5Cu0436%5Cu0434%5Cu0435%5Cu043D%5Cu0438%5Cu0435.%22%20%7D%3B%20%7D%20let%20executionResult%20%3D%20null%3B%20try%20%7B%20if%20(typeof%20execute%20%3D%3D%3D%20%22function%22)%20%7B%20executionResult%20%3D%20await%20execute(action%2C%20context)%3B%20%7D%20else%20%7B%20executionResult%20%3D%20%7B%20mode%3A%20%22dry_run%22%2C%20message%3A%20%22Execution%20handler%20%5Cu043D%5Cu0435%20%5Cu043F%5Cu0435%5Cu0440%5Cu0435%5Cu0434%5Cu0430%5Cu artupActionId%2C%20context%3A%20startupContext%2C%20policy%3A%20phase3Policy%2C%20logger%3A%20(auditEntry)%20%3D%3E%20shell.appendLog(logger.info(%60Action%20audit%3A%20%24%7BJSON.stringify(auditEntry)%7D%60))%2C%20execute%3A%20async%20(action%2C%20context)%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20const%20logDebug%20%3D%20(message%2C%20meta%20%3D%20%7B%7D)%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20shell.appendLog(logger.info(%60%24%7Bmessage%7D%3A%20%24%7BJSON.stringify(meta)%7D%60))%3B%20%7D%3B%20const%20startedAt%20%3D%20Date.now()%3B%20const%20actionExecutors%20%3D%20createActionExecutors(%7B%20modules%3A%20%7B%20accountsModule%2C%20billingModule%2C%20businessesModule%2C%20pagesModule%2C%20diagnosticsModule%20%7D%2C%20accessToken%3A%20token%2C%20context%2C%20logDebug%20%7D)%3B%20const%20execution%20%3D%20await%20runActionExecutor(%7B%20actionId%3A%20action.id%2C%20executors%3A%20actionExecutors%20%7D)%3B%20if%20(execution.ok)%20%7B%20const%20actionTitle%20%3D%20action.title%20%7C%7C%20action.id%3B%20return%20buildActionResult(%7B%20rows%3A%20execution.rows%2C%20message%3A%20%60%24%7BactionTitle%7D%20%5Cu0432%5Cu044B%5Cu043F%5Cu043E%5Cu043B%5Cu043D%5Cu0435%5Cu043D.%60%2C%20startedAt%20%7D)%3B%20%7D%20return%20buildActionResult(%7B%20mode%3A%20%22dry_run%22%2C%20rows%3A%20execution.rows%2C%20warnings%3A%20execution.warnings%2C%20message%3A%20%22Execution%20handler%20%5Cu043D%5Cu0435%20%5Cu043D%5Cu0430%5Cu0439%5Cu0434%5Cu0435%5Cu043D.%22%2C%20startedAt%20%7D)%3B%20%7D%20%7D).then((result)%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20if%20(!result.ok)%20%7B%20shell.appendLog(logger.warning(%60Action%20pipeline%3A%20%24%7Bresult.reason%7D%60))%3B%20%7D%20else%20%7B%20shell.appendLog(logger.info(%60Action%20pipeline%20duration%3A%20%24%7Bresult.durationMs%7Dms%60))%3B%20shell.appendLog(logger.success(result.message))%3B%20%7D%20%7D)%3B%20%7D%20else%20%7B%20shell.appendLog(logger.warning(%22%5Cu041D%5Cu0435%5Cu0442%20%5Cu0434%5Cu043E%5Cu0441%5Cu0442%5Cu0443%5Cu043F%5Cu043D%5Cu044B%5Cu0445%20enabled%20controlled%20actions%20%5Cu0434%5Cu043B%5Cu04
